name: Szechwan White Cut Chicken with Spicy Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole green onion, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a 2-quart pan with the onion, ginger, sherry, salt, sugar, and water. Bring to a boil, cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
2. Remove from heat and let stand until chicken is cool enough to handle. Strain broth and save for soup. Remove and discard skin from chicken. Pull meat from bones, then pull meat into long shreds. If made ahead, cover and chill.
3. Sauce:
- Stir together peanut butter and salad oil until blended.
- Stir in soy sauce, sugar, vinegar, sesame oil, ground red pepper, green onion, and cilantro.
4. To serve, mound lettuce on a serving platter. Arrange shredded chicken over lettuce. Drizzle peanut sauce over all.
